mapper.insert: INSERT INTO stage_eval (cycle_id, child_id, scores_summary, delta_summary, draft, finalized_content, status) VALUES (#{cycleId}, #{childId}, #{scoresSummary}, #{deltaSummary}, #{draft}, #{finalizedContent}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT id, cycle_id, child_id, scores_summary, delta_summary, draft, finalized_content, status FROM stage_eval WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, cycle_id, child_id, scores_summary, delta_summary, draft, finalized_content, status FROM stage_eval WHERE cycle_id = #{cycleId} ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE stage_eval SET draft = #{draft} WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'DRAFT'
UPDATE stage_eval SET finalized_content = #{content}, status = 'FINALIZED' WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'DRAFT'
